title: IIT BHU Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Project Engineer Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Technology, BHU (IIT BHU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Assistant Project Engineer Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.E./M. Tech, B.E./B. Tech in Electronics Engineering can apply for the IIT BHU Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the educa...
